feed.title: Assaf Sapir's Blog
feed.subtitle: Thoughts on software, web development, and open source.

entry.title: Arch Linux on Raspberry Pi 5: ALARM vs the Official aarch64 Port
entry.summary: Comparing Arch Linux ARM with the unofficial aarch64 port at ports.archlinux.page — package versions, RPi 5 support gaps, and a step-by-step guide to building a bootable VM image for UTM.
